description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was in manual mode making a left turn from Lemon St. onto Oakdell St.. A passenger vehicle passed through a stop sign 
without slowing and made contact with the rear and left side of the Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle incurred minor damage to its rear, left 
bumper and rear sensor. There were no injuries and the police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
